info.title: Toku API
info.description: The Toku API lets you programmatically manage token grants, wallets, employees, payroll, and invoices. Build custom integrations and automate your token compensation workflows.

tags.name: Grants
tags.description: Create, list, terminate, and revert token grants

tags.name: Wallets
tags.description: Manage recipient wallets, verification, and distributions

tags.name: Employees
tags.description: Manage user roles within your organization

tags.name: Tokens & Networks
tags.description: Configure token types and blockchain networks for your organization

tags.name: Distributions
tags.description: Approve vestings, add tax details, update FMV, finalize, submit settlements, and track status

tags.name: Custody
tags.description: Connect custody providers (Fireblocks, Anchorage, Safe), manage custody wallets, and allocate to grants

tags.name: Payroll
tags.description: Payroll run creation, management, and state transitions

tags.name: EOR
tags.description: Employer of Record employee onboarding and management

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook endpoint management and event delivery

tags.name: Stablecoin Funding
tags.description: Token payroll creation and stablecoin settlement

bearerAuth.description: Personal API token. Create via createUserApiToken endpoint.

grantAmount.description: Total token units (0 for fiat grants)

employmentType.description: TGA employment type. Valid values: CONTRACTOR, EMPLOYEE, EX_EMPLOYEE, ADVISOR, SERVICE_PROVIDER, OTHER.

token.description: The API token value. Store securely — cannot be retrieved again.

WalletReference.description: Links a wallet to a grant with a distribution ratio

WebhookEventType.description: Webhook event type emitted by the partner-facing API.

email.description: User email for the API token

fromHRIS.description: Whether the token is requested from the HRIS integration flow

email.description: User email for the API token

GetAllPayrollInput.description: No request body is required for listing payroll runs.

exchangeRate.description: FX rate used for payroll calculations

isSyncedFromHRIS.description: Whether payroll originated from HRIS sync

isCsvUploaded.description: Whether payroll data came from CSV upload

payrolls.description: Payroll runs for the authenticated organization

payrollFiatCurrency.description: Fiat currency code for the payroll

exchangeRate.description: FX rate used for payroll calculations

isSyncedFromHRIS.description: Whether payroll originated from HRIS sync

isCsvUploaded.description: Whether payroll data came from CSV upload

exchangeRate.description: FX rate used for payroll calculations

isSyncedFromHRIS.description: Whether payroll originated from HRIS sync

isCsvUploaded.description: Whether payroll data came from CSV upload

exchangeRate.description: FX rate used for payroll calculations

isSyncedFromHRIS.description: Whether payroll originated from HRIS sync

isCsvUploaded.description: Whether payroll data came from CSV upload

stableCoinPercentage.description: Percentage of pay allocated to stablecoin

isCSVUploaded.description: Whether the rows originated from a CSV upload

stableCoinPercentage.description: Percentage of pay allocated to stablecoin

hasTGAProfile.description: Whether the employee has a Toku profile

hasValidWallet.description: Whether the employee has a valid wallet configured

hasPayrollError.description: Whether payroll validation found an error

GetHrisPeopleInput.description: No request body is required for listing HRIS people.

GetOnboardingOverviewInput.description: No request body is required for onboarding overview.

tokenGrantRequested.description: Whether a token grant was requested

lastAccessedAt.description: When the step was last accessed

success.description: Whether the profile update request succeeded

search.description: Search term for employee or payslip metadata

periodKey.description: Accounting period key in YYYY-MM format

limit.description: Maximum number of payslips to return

totalCount.description: Total payslip count matching the filters

ListWebhookEndpointsInput.description: No request body is required for listing webhook endpoints.

httpStatus.description: HTTP response status from the destination

signingSecret.description: Signing secret returned only at creation time

success.description: Whether the webhook endpoint was deleted

isStablecoinOnlySettlement.description: Whether only stablecoin settlement is used

isSyncedFromHRIS.description: Whether payroll originated from HRIS sync

isCsvUploaded.description: Whether CSV data has been uploaded

isPlaceholder.description: Whether this record is a placeholder

isStablecoinOnlySettlement.description: Whether only stablecoin settlement is used

fundingEmailSent.description: Whether funding email has been sent

success.description: Whether pending settlements were computed successfully

inprogress.description: Whether the settlement is already in progress
Whether the settlement is already in progress

totalTokenPercentage.description: Total percentage of pay allocated to token

Unauthorized.description: Authentication failed — token missing, invalid, or expired

Forbidden.description: Caller does not have the required role

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded (100 req/min per IP)

get.description: Returns all grants for the authenticated organization. Filter by externalEmployeeID in the response to get grants for a specific employee.

parameters.name: x-role-type
parameters.description: Role context for the request. Use CLIENT_ORG_ADMIN for most integrations.

401.description: Authentication failed — token missing, invalid, or expired

403.description: Caller does not have the required role

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (100 req/min per IP)

get.description: Returns all grants for a specific employee. Provide either payrollEmployeeID or externalEmployeeID.

parameters.name: x-role-type
parameters.description: Role context for the request. Use CLIENT_ORG_ADMIN for most integrations.

parameters.name: payrollEmployeeID
parameters.description: Payroll identifier. Takes precedence when both are provided.

parameters.name: externalEmployeeID
parameters.description: External HRIS identifier. At least one ID is required.
